requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Safety — IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Evidence for LSI and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器安全——面向LSI和项目验收的IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2证据
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器安全——面向LSI和項目驗收的IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2證據

summary.en: Solar PV inverter safety evidence for Lesotho should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 unless LSI, LEWA, LEC, or the project owner specifies a different adopted edition. IEC 62109-1 covers general safety requirements for power converters used in PV power systems; IEC 62109-2 covers inverter-specific requirements. For grid-connected PV projects, safety evidence is normally reviewed together with grid-interface, EMC, installation, and commissioning documentation. Because Lesotho uses South African transit routes and often follows regional technical practice, IEC-based certificates from an ILAC-recognised laboratory are the most practical evidence package for importer, EPC, utility, and project-owner review.
summary.zh: 莱索托太阳能光伏逆变器安全证据应围绕IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2准备，除非LSI、LEWA、LEC或项目业主指定其他采纳版本。IEC 62109-1规定光伏电力系统用功率变换器通用安全要求；IEC 62109-2规定逆变器特殊要求。对于并网光伏项目，安全证据通常与电网接口、EMC、安装和调试文件一并审查。由于莱索托使用南非过境路线且常遵循区域技术规程，来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC证书是便于进口商、EPC、公用事业公司和项目业主审查的实际证据包。
summary.zht: 賴索托太陽能光伏逆變器安全證據應圍繞IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2準備，除非LSI、LEWA、LEC或項目業主指定其他採納版本。IEC 62109-1規定光伏電力系統用功率轉換器通用安全要求；IEC 62109-2規定逆變器特殊要求。對於併網光伏項目，安全證據通常與電網接口、EMC、安裝和調試文件一併審查。由於賴索托使用南非過境路線且常遵循區域技術規程，來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC證書是便於進口商、EPC、公用事業公司和項目業主審查的實際證據包。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LSI — Lesotho Standards Institution standards adoption and conformity context
LEWA / LEC project approval context for grid-connected PV installations

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety documentation commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory quality files, CQC/CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited domestic test reports. These documents may demonstrate a mature China compliance baseline, but they are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence in Lesotho. GB/T 19964-2024 is a PV power-station grid-connection standard and does not replace product safety testing for the inverter.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全文件通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工厂质量文件、CQC/CGC自愿认证以及CNAS认可的国内测试报告。这些文件可以证明成熟的中国合规基准，但不能自动替代莱索托所需的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。GB/T 19964-2024是光伏电站并网标准，不能替代逆变器产品安全测试。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全文件通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工廠品質文件、CQC/CGC自願認證以及CNAS認可的國內測試報告。這些文件可以證明成熟的中國合規基準，但不能自動替代賴索托所需的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。GB/T 19964-2024是光伏電站併網標準，不能替代逆變器產品安全測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (grid-connection baseline, not product safety substitute)

gap.en: Gap: A China GB/T safety or grid certificate should not be submitted as the sole product-safety basis for Lesotho. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports for the specific inverter model or family, including model-family coverage, critical components, firmware/hardware version, environmental ratings, markings, installation manual, and nameplate data. Confirm with LSI, the importer, EPC, LEWA, and LEC whether the accepted certificate must be from an ILAC-recognised laboratory and whether any South African regional conformity practice applies because Lesotho is a SACU member and imports through South Africa.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T安全或并网证书不应作为莱索托唯一的产品安全依据提交。出口商应提供覆盖具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书和报告，包括型号系列覆盖范围、关键元器件、固件/硬件版本、环境等级、标识、安装手册和铭牌数据。应与LSI、进口商、EPC、LEWA和LEC确认是否必须接受来自ILAC认可实验室的证书，以及因莱索托是SACU成员并经南非进口是否适用任何南非区域合格评定规程。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T安全或併網證書不應作為賴索托唯一的產品安全依據提交。出口商應提供覆蓋具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書和報告，包括型號系列覆蓋範圍、關鍵元器件、韌體/硬體版本、環境等級、標識、安裝手冊和銘牌數據。應與LSI、進口商、EPC、LEWA和LEC確認是否必須接受來自ILAC認可實驗室的證書，以及因賴索托是SACU成員並經南非進口是否適用任何南非區域合格評定規程。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory in practice where LSI, importer, EPC, LEWA, LEC, or project owner requires IEC safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverter acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T and voluntary certification evidence may support domestic procurement, but it is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Lesotho

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 19964-2024 alone for Lesotho PV inverter safety acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 model-specific evidence, check certificate coverage and laboratory accreditation, and confirm LSI, LEWA, LEC, importer, EPC, and project-owner requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004或GB/T 19964-2024作为莱索托光伏逆变器安全验收依据。应准备IEC 62109-1/-2型号特定证据，核查证书覆盖范围和实验室认可，并在出货前确认LSI、LEWA、LEC、进口商、EPC和项目业主要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004或GB/T 19964-2024作為賴索托光伏逆變器安全驗收依據。應準備IEC 62109-1/-2型號特定證據，核查證書覆蓋範圍和實驗室認可，並在出貨前確認LSI、LEWA、LEC、進口商、EPC和項目業主要求。
